title: Feed Cost Estimator
description: Industrial-grade calculation tool for estimating total feed cost per animal per day, incorporating raw material costs, processing losses, and quality adjustments. Aligned with ISO 22000, Lean, Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Daily feed intake per animal (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Average daily feed consumption per animal, based on species and growth stage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average daily feed consumption per animal, based on species and growth stage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tür ve büyüme aşamasına göre hayvan başına ortalama günlük yem tüketimi.

inputs.label: Raw material cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost of primary feed ingredients (corn, soybean meal, etc.) per kilogram.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of primary feed ingredients (corn, soybean meal, etc.) per kilogram.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel yem bileşenlerinin (mısır, soya küspesi vb.) kilogram başına maliyeti.

inputs.label: Processing loss (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of raw material lost during milling, mixing, pelleting, or storage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of raw material lost during milling, mixing, pelleting, or storage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öğütme, karıştırma, peletleme veya depolama sırasında kaybedilen hammadde yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Moisture adjustment factor
inputs.businessContext: Correction factor for moisture content variation in raw materials (1.0 = standard).

businessContext_i18n.en: Correction factor for moisture content variation in raw materials (1.0 = standard).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hammaddelerdeki nem içeriği değişimi için düzeltme faktörü (1.0 = standart).

inputs.label: Quality grade
inputs.businessContext: Grade of feed based on nutrient density and consistency (premium, standard, economy).

businessContext_i18n.en: Grade of feed based on nutrient density and consistency (premium, standard, economy).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Besin yoğunluğu ve tutarlılığına göre yem sınıfı (premium, standart, ekonomi).

inputs.label: Include transport cost?
inputs.businessContext: If true, adds a fixed transport surcharge per kg of feed.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, adds a fixed transport surcharge per kg of feed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Evet ise, kg yem başına sabit bir nakliye ek ücreti ekler.

rules.message: Feed intake must be greater than zero.
Raw material cost must be positive.
Processing loss must be between 0% and 15%.
Moisture adjustment factor must be between 0.85 and 1.15.

thresholds.message: Daily feed cost exceeds $5.00 per animal – review ingredient sourcing.
Processing loss above 8% – investigate equipment or process inefficiency.
Moisture adjustment factor deviates more than 8% from standard – verify moisture content.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
